body:
## Summary

Adds the complete, **review-only** Dealix Launch Company OS across company strategy, website, commercial GTM, a 400+/day founder-review draft factory, media/social OS, ads planning, CRM, delivery, analytics, external go-live requirements, safety/compliance, read-only API endpoints, GitHub Actions, verification scripts, and final evidence reports.

**Governing rule enforced everywhere:**
> AI drafts, ranks, and recommends. The founder reviews, approves, and sends manually. The system never sends externally.

Every generated draft carries `send_allowed=false`, `external_send_blocked=true`, `requires_founder_approval=true`, `no_auto_send=true`.

## Includes

- **Company OS** — `docs/company-os/` (10 docs + report)
- **Website Launch OS** — `apps/web/app/` (18 routes, SEO metadata + JSON-LD) + `docs/site-launch/`
- **Commercial Launch OS** — `docs/commercial-launch/` (24 docs)
- **First 5 verticals** — FM · Contracting & Project Controls · Real Estate & Property Ops · Legal & Professional Services · Consulting/Training & B2B
- **400+ Daily Draft Factory** — `scripts/commercial_generate_400_drafts.py` (175 cold email / 100 follow-up / 75 LinkedIn / 50 contact-form)
- **Founder Review Queue** — ranked `founder_review.md` + `top_50_priority.md`
- **Safety / Compliance / Quality gates** — `commercial_safety_audit.py`, `commercial_compliance_gate.py`, `commercial_quality_gate.py`
- **Media & Social OS** + **Ads planning OS** (plan-only) — `docs/media-social-os/`, `config/ad_campaigns_seed.json`
- **CRM / Lead Ops OS** — `config/crm_pipeline_schema.json` (14 record-only stages, no push-send)
- **Delivery OS**, **Analytics OS**, **External Go-Live OS**
- **Final Launch Control Tower** — `scripts/final_launch_control_verify.py` → `outputs/final_launch_control/final_verification.{json,md}`
- **GitHub Actions** — `commercial-draft-factory`, `media-social-calendar`, `site-commercial-verify`, `final-launch-control` (dispatch + schedule, `permissions: contents: read`, no secrets, artifact-only)
- **Tests** — 16 self-contained modules (55 tests)
- **8 final reports** (`99_*.md`)

## Safety

- No external sending. No SMTP. No WhatsApp outbound. No LinkedIn automation. No website auto-submit. No scraping. No bulk sending. No live paid ads.
- No secrets, no API keys added.
- All drafts require founder approval and are sent manually.
- The read-only API router has GET-only endpoints and no send routes.
- GitHub Actions are artifact-only / read-only and never send.

## Tests Run (real results)

- **Launch OS pytest (16 modules): 55 passed** — generate/safety/no-send/quality/compliance/outputs-schema/founder-review/seed/media/site/site-pages/crm/api/secret-scan/readiness/final-control.
- **Pipeline (local):** 400 drafts generated · safety audit PASS · site check PASS (18 pages) · API check PASS · media verify PASS · secret+risk scan PASS (132 files) · CRM schema PASS.
- **`scripts/final_launch_control_verify.py` → GO (31/31 critical checks).**
- `ruff check` clean on all new files; `make env-check` → OK.
- `make security-smoke` → **fails on pre-existing files only** (test fixtures + docs under `tests/`, `docs/launch/`, `docs/ops/` that predate this PR); **none of the new launch files are flagged.**
- `make api-contract-check` / `make prod-verify` / `make test` → **not runnable to completion in this environment** because the full app stack (fastapi/pydantic/etc.) is not installed here; the launch OS is intentionally stdlib-only and its tests pass standalone. The read-only API router and `api/main.py` change compile (`py_compile`) and the include is guarded so it cannot break startup.
- `cd apps/web && npm run verify` (typecheck + build) → **not executed** in this environment (no `npm install` run); the website is validated statically by `site_launch_static_check.py` (pages, metadata, CTAs, verticals, sitemap, forbidden-claim absence). Build verification recommended in CI.

## Go / No-Go

**Decision: GO** for: public website launch, commercial positioning, 400 review-only drafts/day, founder manual review, media/social planning, manual social posting, paid diagnostics, discovery calls, proposals, pilot planning, analytics schema, delivery preparation.

**NO-GO (blocked):** automated email sending, WhatsApp cold outreach, LinkedIn automation, website form auto-submit, bulk sending, paid ads live launch without tracking/compliance, processing sensitive data before agreement, external sending from GitHub Actions.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TdovCMDrCgRY2hhrGDmKAi

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01TdovCMDrCgRY2hhrGDmKAi)_

commits.messageBody:
Add the complete, review-only Dealix Launch Company OS across company
strategy, website, commercial GTM, a 400+/day founder-review draft factory,
media/social planning, ads planning, CRM, delivery, analytics, external
go-live requirements, safety/compliance gates, read-only API endpoints,
GitHub Actions, verification scripts, and final GO/NO-GO evidence.

Governing rule enforced everywhere: AI drafts, ranks, and recommends; the
founder reviews, approves, and sends manually; the system never sends
externally. Every generated draft carries send_allowed=false,
external_send_blocked=true, requires_founder_approval=true, no_auto_send=true.

Includes:
- Company OS, Commercial Launch OS (+5 vertical playbooks), Delivery OS,
  Analytics OS, Media & Social OS, Ads OS (plan-only), External Go-Live OS,
  Site Launch OS, Final Launch Control Tower docs (all bilingual AR/EN).
- 400+ Daily Draft Factory with quality/compliance/safety gates and the
  founder review queue.
- 14 launch configs + synthetic example seed leads.
- 19 stdlib-only launch scripts (generator, gates, scoring, safety audit,
  readiness, media calendar, site/api static checks, secret+risk scan,
  final launch control verify).
- Next.js website launch pages (18 routes) with SEO metadata + JSON-LD.
- Read-only commercial API router (no send endpoints), guarded include.
- 4 GitHub Actions (dispatch + schedule, contents: read, no secrets,
  artifact-only): commercial draft factory, media calendar, site/commercial
  verify, final launch control.
- 16 self-contained test modules (55 tests) green.

Safety: no SMTP, no WhatsApp outbound, no LinkedIn automation, no website
form auto-submit, no bulk sending, no scraping, no live paid ads, no secrets.

Verified locally: 400 drafts generated, safety audit PASS, final launch
control decision = GO (31/31 critical checks).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TdovCMDrCgRY2hhrGDmKAi
commits.messageHeadline: feat(launch): complete Dealix full launch company OS

commits.messageBody:
- Remove unused `timezone` import (UTC is used instead) in the draft factory.
- Make intentional multi-line strings explicit (`+`) to clear CodeQL
  "implicit string concatenation" in the generator and control verifier.
- Stop echoing the matched regex into media_social_verify error messages
  (clears CodeQL "clear-text logging of sensitive information").
- Drop unused `_launch_util` imports from launch test modules (path setup is
  handled centrally in tests/conftest.py).

No behavior change. Launch OS tests pass (55) and final launch control
verification remains GO (31/31).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TdovCMDrCgRY2hhrGDmKAi
